fault_hypothesis: The code on line 77 incorrectly removes an element from the merged list when both input lists share the same final element. This violates the documented behavior of preserving all elements from both inputs.

constraints.intent: The final list length must equal the sum of input lengths, which is violated by the pop operation.
The total count of merged items must remain consistent with inputs after executing this erroneous branch.

spec.expr: not (merged__1 and left and right and merged__1[-1] == left[-1] == right[-1])

constraints.intent: The condition that triggers the erroneous removal of a shared final element should never be met.
The final returned list must contain all elements from both inputs.
